zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffroy de Pont-L'abbé於大約1255年出生在法國布列塔尼分尼斯艾朋吉利阿貝時，他的父親Hervé Quelennec de Pont-L'Abbé17歲，母親Plésou de Rostrenen20歲。他於大約1275年與Jeanne de Malestroit在法國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1327年1月9日在他的家鄉享年73歲，埋葬在法國布列塔尼分尼斯艾朋吉利阿貝。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffroy de Pont-L'abbé于大约1255年出生在法国布列塔尼分尼斯艾朋吉利阿貝时，他的父亲Hervé Quelennec de Pont-L'Abbé17岁，母亲Plésou de Rostrenen20岁。他于大约1275年与Jeanne de Malestroit在法国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1327年1月9日在他的家乡享年73岁，埋葬在法国布列塔尼分尼斯艾朋吉利阿貝。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Geoffroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffroy de Pont-L'abbé was born about 1255, in Pont-l'Abbé, Finistère, Brittany, France, his father, Hervé Quelennec de Pont-L'Abbé, was 17 and his mother, Plésou de Rostrenen, was 20. He married Jeanne de Malestroit about 1275, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 9 January 1327, in his hometown, at the age of 73, and was buried in Pont-l'Abbé, Finistère, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffroy de Pont-L'abbé est né environ 1255, à Pont-l'Abbé, Finistère, Bretagne, France, son père, Hervé Quelennec de Pont-L'Abbé, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Plésou de Rostrenen, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Malestroit environ 1275, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 janvier 1327, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Pont-l'Abbé, Finistère, Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffroy de Pont-L'abbé um 1255 in Pont-l'Abbé, Finistère, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hervé Quelennec de Pont-L'Abbé 17 und seine Mutter Plésou de Rostrenen 20. Er hat um 1275 in Frankreich Jeanne de Malestroit geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Januar 1327 im Alter von 73 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Pont-l'Abbé, Finistère, Bretagne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroy de Pont-L'abbé è nato il circa 1255 nel Pont-l'Abbé, Finistère, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Hervé Quelennec de Pont-L'Abbé, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Plésou de Rostrenen, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Malestroit circa 1275, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 gennaio 1327, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Pont-l'Abbé, Finistère, Bretagne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffroy de Pont-L'abbéが約1255年にフランスブレタグンフィニストeアポント-ル'アブeで生まれた時，父Hervé Quelennec de Pont-L'Abbéは17歳，母Plésou de Rostrenenは20歳であった。約1275年にフランスでJeanne de Malestroitと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1327年1月9日に故郷で73歳で死去し，フランスブレタグンフィニストeアポント-ル'アブeにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffroy de Pont-L'abbé(이)가 대략 1255년 프랑스 브레타그니 핑니스트e르 폰트-'압브e에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hervé Quelennec de Pont-L'Abbé(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Plésou de Rostrenen(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1275년 프랑스에서 Jeanne de Malestroit(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1327년 1월 9일 그의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 브레타그니 핑니스트e르 폰트-'압브e에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroy de Pont-L'abbé nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Pont-l'Abbé, Finistère, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Hervé Quelennec de Pont-L'Abbé, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Plésou de Rostrenen, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Malestroit aproximadamente 1275, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de janeiro de 1327, em sua cidade natal, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Pont-l'Abbé, Finistère, Bretagne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffroy de Pont-L'abbé родился около 1255 г. в местности понт-л'аббe, финистeр, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Hervé Quelennec de Pont-L'Abbé было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Plésou de Rostrenen, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Malestroit около 1275 г. в местности Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 9 января 1327 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности понт-л'аббe, финистeр, бретагн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffroy de Pont-L'abbé nació aproximadamente 1255, en Pont-l'Abbé, Finistère, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Hervé Quelennec de Pont-L'Abbé, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Plésou de Rostrenen, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Malestroit aproximadamente 1275, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de enero de 1327, en su pueblo, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Pont-l'Abbé, Finistère, Bretagne, Francia.
